title: 23 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including 2 Kings
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average and median increase of 8.0%.

title: The Hartford: Stock Remains Inexpensive While The Dividend Jumps
text: Insurance stocks continue to sport impressive relative strength in an uncertain year. With a dividend increase just reported and a low valuation, The Hartford appears positioned for more strong returns.

title: 5 Stocks to Watch on Recent Dividend Hikes Amid High Volatility
text: Investors may keep a tab on ABBV, ASTE, BCC, ESQ and HIG, which have lately hiked their dividend payments to reward investors.

title: The Hartford Names Tracey Ant Head Of Middle & Large Commercial Business Units
